name: Render
description: Render provides cloud hosting for web services, static sites, background workers, cron jobs, and managed databases. Use this API to create and manage services, trigger deployments, configure environment variables, manage custom domains, disks, blueprints, and more.

capabilities.name: services_list
capabilities.description: List all services with filtering by name, type, region, environment, and suspension status.

capabilities.name: services_create
capabilities.description: Create a new service (web service, static site, worker, cron job, or private service) from a Git repo or Docker image.

capabilities.name: services_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific service by ID.

capabilities.name: services_update
capabilities.description: Update a service's configuration including build command, start command, environment, plan, and scaling.

capabilities.name: services_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a service and all its associated resources.

capabilities.name: services_suspend
capabilities.description: Suspend a running service to stop it temporarily.

capabilities.name: services_resume
capabilities.description: Resume a suspended service.

capabilities.name: services_restart
capabilities.description: Restart a running service.

capabilities.name: services_scale
capabilities.description: Set the number of instances for a service.

capabilities.name: services_autoscale
capabilities.description: Configure autoscaling rules for a service.

capabilities.name: services_purge_cache
capabilities.description: Purge the build cache for a service.

capabilities.name: deploys_list
capabilities.description: List all deploys for a service with filtering by status and timestamps.

capabilities.name: deploys_create
capabilities.description: Trigger a new deployment for a service, optionally clearing the build cache.

capabilities.name: deploys_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific deploy by ID.

capabilities.name: deploys_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an in-progress deployment.

capabilities.name: deploys_rollback
capabilities.description: Rollback a service to a previous deploy.

capabilities.name: envvars_list
capabilities.description: List all environment variables for a service.

capabilities.name: envvars_update_all
capabilities.description: Replace all environment variables for a service.

capabilities.name: envvars_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific environment variable by key.

capabilities.name: envvars_update
capabilities.description: Add or update a single environment variable.

capabilities.name: envvars_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a single environment variable.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_list
capabilities.description: List custom domains attached to a service.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_create
capabilities.description: Attach a custom domain to a service.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_get
capabilities.description: Get details about a specific custom domain.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a custom domain from a service.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_verify
capabilities.description: Verify DNS configuration for a custom domain.

capabilities.name: disks_list
capabilities.description: List persistent disks with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: disks_create
capabilities.description: Attach a new persistent disk to a service.

capabilities.name: disks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details about a specific disk.

capabilities.name: disks_update
capabilities.description: Update a disk's name, size, or mount path.

capabilities.name: disks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a persistent disk and all its data.

capabilities.name: blueprints_list
capabilities.description: List blueprints (render.yaml infrastructure-as-code configurations).

capabilities.name: blueprints_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific blueprint by ID.

capabilities.name: blueprints_update
capabilities.description: Update a blueprint's name, auto-sync, or path.

capabilities.name: blueprints_delete
capabilities.description: Disconnect and stop syncing a blueprint.

capabilities.name: jobs_list
capabilities.description: List one-off jobs for a service.

capabilities.name: jobs_create
capabilities.description: Create and run a one-off job for a service.

capabilities.name: jobs_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific one-off job.

capabilities.name: jobs_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a running one-off job.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: List events for a service (deploys, scaling, restarts, etc.).

capabilities.name: owners_list
capabilities.description: List accessible workspaces (owners) with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: owners_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve workspace details by ID.
